behavior_trial_columns.start_time: Start time of epoch, in seconds
behavior_trial_columns.stop_time: Stop time of epoch, in seconds
behavior_trial_columns.animal_response: The response of the animal. 0, left choice; 1, right choice; 2, no response
behavior_trial_columns.rewarded_historyL: The reward history of left lick port
behavior_trial_columns.rewarded_historyR: The reward history of right lick port
behavior_trial_columns.reward_outcome_time: The reward outcome time (reward/no reward/no response) Note: This is in fact time when choice is registered.
behavior_trial_columns.bait_left: Whether the current left lickport has a bait or not
behavior_trial_columns.bait_right: Whether the current right lickport has a bait or not
behavior_trial_columns.base_reward_probability_sum: The summation of left and right reward probability
behavior_trial_columns.reward_probabilityL: The reward probability of left lick port
behavior_trial_columns.reward_probabilityR: The reward probability of right lick port
behavior_trial_columns.reward_random_number_left: The random number used to determine the reward of left lick port
behavior_trial_columns.reward_random_number_right: The random number used to determine the reward of right lick port
behavior_trial_columns.block_beta: The beta of exponential distribution to generate the block length
behavior_trial_columns.block_min: The minimum length allowed for each block
behavior_trial_columns.block_max: The maxmum length allowed for each block
behavior_trial_columns.min_reward_each_block: The minimum reward allowed for each block
behavior_trial_columns.delay_beta: The beta of exponential distribution to generate the delay duration(s)
behavior_trial_columns.delay_min: The minimum duration(s) allowed for each delay
behavior_trial_columns.delay_max: The maxmum duration(s) allowed for each delay
behavior_trial_columns.delay_duration: The expected time duration between delay start and go cue start
behavior_trial_columns.ITI_beta: The beta of exponential distribution to generate the ITI duration(s)
behavior_trial_columns.ITI_min: The minimum duration(s) allowed for each ITI
behavior_trial_columns.ITI_max: The maxmum duration(s) allowed for each ITI
behavior_trial_columns.ITI_duration: The expected time duration between trial start and ITI start
behavior_trial_columns.response_duration: The maximum time that the animal must make a choce in order to get a reward
behavior_trial_columns.reward_consumption_duration: The duration for the animal to consume the reward
behavior_trial_columns.reward_delay: The delay between choice and reward delivery
behavior_trial_columns.laser_wavelength: The wavelength of laser or LED
behavior_trial_columns.laser_1_power: The laser power of the laser 1(mw)
behavior_trial_columns.laser_2_power: The laser power of the laser 2(mw)
behavior_trial_columns.laser_condition: The laser on is conditioned on LaserCondition
behavior_trial_columns.laser_condition_probability: The laser on is conditioned on LaserCondition with a probability LaserConditionPro
behavior_trial_columns.laser_start: Laser start is aligned to an event
behavior_trial_columns.laser_start_offset: Laser start is aligned to an event with an offset
behavior_trial_columns.laser_end: Laser end is aligned to an event
behavior_trial_columns.laser_end_offset: Laser end is aligned to an event with an offset
behavior_trial_columns.laser_rampingdown: The ramping down time of the laser
behavior_trial_columns.laser_pulse_duration: The pulse duration for Pulse protocol
behavior_trial_columns.session_wide_control: Control the optogenetics session wide (e.g. only turn on opto in half of the session)
behavior_trial_columns.fraction_of_session: Turn on/off opto in a fraction of the session (related to session_wide_control)
behavior_trial_columns.session_start_with: The session start with opto on or off (related to session_wide_control)
behavior_trial_columns.session_alternation: Turn on/off opto in every other session (related to session_wide_control)
behavior_trial_columns.minimum_opto_interval: Minimum interval between two optogenetics trials (number of trials)
behavior_trial_columns.auto_train_engaged: Whether the auto training is engaged
behavior_trial_columns.auto_train_curriculum_name: The name of the auto training curriculum
behavior_trial_columns.auto_train_curriculum_version: The version of the auto training curriculum
behavior_trial_columns.auto_train_curriculum_schema_version: The schema version of the auto training curriculum
behavior_trial_columns.auto_train_stage: The current stage of auto training
behavior_trial_columns.auto_train_stage_overridden: Whether the auto training stage is overridden
behavior_trial_columns.lickspout_position_x: x position (um) of the lickspout position (left-right)
behavior_trial_columns.lickspout_position_z: z position (um) of the lickspout position (up-down)
behavior_trial_columns.lickspout_position_y1: y position (um) of the left lickspout position (forward-backward)
behavior_trial_columns.lickspout_position_y2: y position (um) of the right lickspout position (forward-backward)
behavior_trial_columns.trial_ind: Trial index (integer row index in session table)
behavior_trial_columns.right_reward_times: Right reward delivery times within trial, relative to goCue_start_time (s)
behavior_trial_columns.left_reward_times: Left reward delivery times within trial, relative to goCue_start_time (s)
behavior_trial_columns.choice_time_trial: Choice time within trial: reward_outcome_time - goCue_start_time (s)
behavior_trial_columns.auto_manual_trial: True if a reward was delivered before the animal made a choice (auto-water or manual reward)
behavior_trial_columns.extra_reward: True if a reward was delivered that is not registered in rewarded_historyL/R
